_notes: Articles are timely, concise takes — mix of Phronesis originals and curated external pieces
For curated news articles: origin 'via', content_type 'preview' — never reproduce the article text
preview must be written by Phronesis in our own words — 1-2 sentences max
read_time: estimated reading time in minutes

entries.title: Digital Markets Act at One Year: Lessons for U.S. Competition Policy
entries.subtitle: What the DMA's first year of enforcement tells American policymakers.
entries.abstract: The EU's Digital Markets Act completed its first year of active enforcement in 2024. This article evaluates what that year revealed about the regulation's design choices — gatekeeper designation, interoperability mandates, data access rights — and draws concrete lessons for U.S. policymakers considering analogous legislation.

entries.title: The FTC's Algorithmic Accountability Agenda: A Two-Year Review
entries.subtitle: Surveying two years of FTC enforcement and rulemaking on algorithmic systems.
entries.abstract: Since 2023, the FTC has pursued an ambitious agenda on algorithmic accountability — through enforcement actions, policy statements, and rulemaking. This article reviews the full scope of that activity, assesses what it has and has not accomplished, and identifies the enforcement priorities most likely to survive the current political transition.

entries.title: Placeholder: Curated News Article
entries.subtitle: Example of a 'via' article entry with preview only.
entries.preview: A one-to-two sentence summary written by Phronesis in our own words — not a quote from the article — describing what the piece covers and why it is worth reading.
